description: Three speakers discuss rescheduling an existing calendar event from Thursday morning to Thursday afternoon with a shortened duration.

events.title: Strategy Offsite
events.reasoning: Alice needs to move the existing strategy offsite from Thursday 9 AM due to an investor call conflict. All three speakers agree on Thursday 2 PM to 4 PM (2 hours instead of 3). Location and attendees remain the same.

mock_llm_response.summary: Updated 1 event: strategy offsite moved from Thursday 9 AM to 2 PM, duration reduced to 2 hours.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Thursday=Feb 26. Calendar context has the original event at 9 AM. existing_event_id=1 refers to the first calendar_context entry.
